1.title: Module skeleton, shared types, and file discovery
1.evidence: Owns src/validate/mod.rs; creates stub files frontmatter.rs, links.rs, report.rs; defines shared ValidationError/ErrorKind types and find_markdown_files walker. Foundational — no prior task referenced.

2.title: Frontmatter validation (OKF fields)
2.evidence: **dependsOn: 1.** Owns src/validate/frontmatter.rs (stub created by Task 1) and consumes the shared ValidationError/ErrorKind types defined in mod.rs by Task 1.

3.title: Link checking
3.evidence: **dependsOn: 1.** Owns src/validate/links.rs (stub created by Task 1) and consumes shared ValidationError/ErrorKind (BrokenLink) types from mod.rs by Task 1.

4.title: Report rendering, fixtures, and integration
4.evidence: **dependsOn: 1, 2, 3.** Integration test(s) run validate_frontmatter (Task 2) + validate_links (Task 3) over fixtures; render_report fills the report.rs stub created by Task 1.

5.title: Validate
5.evidence: Runs the full validation suite and smoke-tests the run I/O shell over the fixtures from Task 4 (cargo run -- validate src/validate/fixtures), exercising all prior tasks' output. Final gate.
